title: AVITHRAPID - Standard Operating Procedure - PLC3 cells differentiation before HEV infection
author: Bull-Maurer, Anne
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: When infecting PLC3 cell line with HEV for evaluating the antiviral effect of a compound, the PLC3 cells have to be differentiated.
steps_raw: When infecting PLC3 cell line with HEV for evaluating the antiviral effect of a compound, the PLC3 cells have to be differentiated.
